rules: Guests are allowed in amenities when accompanied by a resident.
Children under 14 are not permitted in the gym.
Never guess same-day availability. Direct to ONR for current availability.
bbq: Reserve through ONR. If the resident does not have an ONR account, email admin@brickellhouse.net to register. Only mention that same-day reservations are not available if the resident asks about today or same-day reservations. There is one BBQ area.
theater: Reserve through ONR. Check ONR for fees. Maximum occupancy is 20 people. Food is allowed.
sauna: Dry sauna. Do not pour water on the rocks. Minimum age is 18. If not working, contact the Front Desk.
pool: No glass containers. Towels are not provided. There is no lifeguard. Pool chairs cannot be reserved.
gym: Guests must be accompanied by a resident. Outside personal trainers are allowed. No food or drinks.
owners_lounge: Can be reserved. Fee is listed in ONR. Capacity is 60 people.
response_es: Responde en español sobre amenidades. Para el BBQ, explica que se reserva por ONR; solo menciona la regla de mismo día si preguntan por hoy o mismo día.
